content.en:
Ruins of the old site of the Angel Clan.

A group of cultivators from the Cangyu Universe arrived here, they were all very nervous at this time, but no one was arrogant, after all, this was a different universe, no one knew the situation, and they were even worried that the supremes of this universe would make a move against them.

Once the Supreme has made a move, no amount of cards in their hole cards will be of any use.

"Let's go!"

One by one, the cultivators tore through the void and left, and some even used spatial treasures to escape from this area.

Secretly, some Supremes hesitated, but still didn't make a move.

"Forget it, let's send someone over too!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and other humanites.

Next, each force sent a lot of cosmic gods and galaxy-level to the Cangyu Universe.

A group of celestial pavilion's galaxy-level and cosmic gods have also entered, although many people will die, but if they get some opportunities, they are even expected to be in the supreme realm.

As a matter of fact.

If all the Supremes don't touch these cultivators of the Cangyu Universe, that's impossible.

Some cultivators with weak strength and lack of luck naturally became the targets of some supreme beings, such as Ye Tian who captured a galaxy-level cultivator from the Cangyu Universe.

As long as it's fast and not exposed, it's fine.

If it's well known, it's not easy to get it.

A starry sky.

Ye Tian hypnotized the Cangyu Universe Starship level cultivator he had captured, and then began to inquire about the situation in the Cangyu Universe.

The Earth Venerables of the Cangyu Universe also knew that it was impossible to hide the situation of their universe, so they did not do anything to the soul of this cultivator, and after some inquiry, the situation of the Cangyu Universe was quickly known to Ye Tian.

After roughly inquiring about it, Ye Tian killed this person.

Judging from what Ye Tian knew, the Cangyu Universe was also in the thirteenth era, and there were also supremes from the previous twelve universe eras, and these supremes controlled many forces.

As for the strength of the Supremes, the small galaxy level naturally doesn't know much, and most of them are rumors.

However, the Cangyu Universe does not divide forces by race, but divides strength by sects, which is somewhat similar to the twelve universe epochs of this universe.

In the Cangyu Universe, the strength of those who have the Earth Venerable is called the top sect, and the strength of those who have the strength of the Ten Star Earth Venerable is called the Super Sect.

And the most powerful force in the Cangyu universe is not the super sect, but the holy land.

Before, there was only one Holy Land in the Cangyu Universe, but with the arrival of those Twelve Universe Era Supremes, the Cangyu Universe now has eighteen Holy Lands.

Each holy place has a large number of earth deities, and as for the specific number of supremes, this person is not clear.

"The Holy Land must have a divine general, otherwise it is not qualified to override the super sect. Eighteen Holy Lands, if you say this, the Cangyu Universe has at least eighteen Divine Generals, but in fact, it must be more than eighteen Divine Generals! It is also an ordinary universe, I didn't expect the Cangyu Universe to be so powerful!" Ye Tian frowned.

If the eighteen god generals were united, even if they were all the weakest god generals, he would not be an opponent, and how could the eighteen god generals be the lowest-level one-star early stage god generals?

"Maybe you have a two-star god general!"

Ye Tian thought.

As for the three-star god general, he doesn't think that Cangyu Universe has it.

If the three-star god generals are basically against the sky, they are qualified to transcend it. If you are not a detached person, you must have a legacy comparable to that of the great being, and you will have a way to leave.

Therefore, the possibility of Cangyu Universe having a three-star god general is very low.

But Ye Tian can't compete with a two-star god general now, so he must keep a low profile.

"It seems that I have to discuss with the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others, the Lord of the Yuan Gu Those old guys are all ancient beings who have experienced an era of the universe, they know a lot of secrets, and even know some chaos inheritance, my current strength is a one-star late god general, and the strength far exceeds that of the Lord of the Yuan Gu. If the Lord of the Yuan Gu tells me about those inheritance places, I can get some more benefits, share some benefits with the Lord of the Yuan Gu and them, and maybe let the Lord of the Yuan Gu and them also break the shackles and be promoted to a one-star god general!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This method is very good, once the Lord of the Yuan Gu is promoted to the level of a one-star god general, his pressure will be much less, and he can even let the Lord of the Yuan Gu put them in front.

"Go find the Lord of the Yuangu!"

Ye Tian muttered.

---------

Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sat on his throne, thinking about what to do next.

Suddenly.

A terrifying aura came, and it made him tremble.

"Who, could it be the Supreme of the Cangyu Universe who broke in?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu instinctively guessed.

But when I think about it, this time is short, even if the one-star god generals of the Cangyu universe come over, at most they can only exert the strength of the first-class supreme, they dare to come over, they are not afraid of being surrounded and killed by a group of weak people?

"Lord of the Yuangu, let's meet!"

Ye Tian's voice came.

Rumble!!!

In the void outside the Yuangu Palace, Ye Tian and the Lord of Yuangu met.

Both of them are real people!

The Lord of the Yuan Gu also knew that if the other party was not good for him, it would be useless for him to hide in the Yuan Gu Palace.

"It's you, Wanfa Supreme!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was shocked.

"Yes, it's me!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Have you stepped into a one-star god general?" The Lord of the Yuan Gu was surprised, and he couldn't even believe it, the other party had only been cultivating for a long time, and his strength had surpassed him.

"That's good!" Ye Tian generously accepted, "I've stepped into a one-star god general, but what's the use, there is more than one god general in the Cangyu universe, and the Lord of the Yuan Gu should also know about it, right?"

"Yes, I already knew about it just now, so I'm distressed!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded.

"Let's cooperate!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Cooperation?" the Lord of the Yuan Gu smiled bitterly, "I am only a first-class Supreme, and the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws cooperates with me?"

Ye Tian said directly: "Lord of the Yuan Gu, your current strength is indeed not enough, but it does not mean that you cannot be promoted to a one-star god general, if you can't even cross a one-star god general, then you are not qualified to transcend." You have lived a cosmic era, and the first cosmic epoch is the most special month cosmic epoch, the new universe is born, and it is impossible for the strong in the chaos not to notice it, maybe at that time, there were many great powers in the chaos thrown into a lot of inheritance. I can't find these inheritance places, but the Lord of the Yuan Gu should know something!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu knew Ye Tian's plan as soon as he heard it, and immediately said in a cold voice: "Ten Thousand Law Supreme, you want to seek those inheritances, why do I want to tell you, do you want to threaten me with your strength?"

"No!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I am a one-star god general, my strength is far beyond you, if I enter those inheritances, I will definitely get a lot of benefits, and when the time comes, I will give you some, maybe you can break the shackles." Besides, there are many supremes in the twelve universes, and the people who cooperate with me are not inferior to you, if you don't agree, I will find other supremes. "

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he waited for the answer of the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

He believed that the Lord of the Yuan Gu would give him a satisfactory answer!
